title: Gap Women's Relaxed Fit Soft Cotton Gauze Tiered Dress
description: We love a dress that is as comfortable as it is cute, and the Gap Women’s Gauze Dress definitely fits the bill. In a relaxed silhouette and a soft, breathable fabric that avoids wrinkling, it’s perfect for an on-the-go lifestyle – and made for effortless style. Just slip on the dress with some flats or sandals for a quick and easy brunch look, or add a cardigan and heels to wear it to the office. It would also make a great swim cover-up, seamlessly taking you from beach to boardwalk. Plus, the dress has pockets, to keep you hands-free and carefree all day long. Measurements for reference lying flat (unstretched): Size S: Pit to Pit 17.
